# LiquidStack

**Category:** Immersion Cooling, Liquid Cooling, Direct-to-Chip Cooling
**Website:** https://liquidstack.com/

## Headline
Immersion and direct liquid cooling provider for hyperscale, enterprise, and edge AI deployments.

## Overview
LiquidStack strengthens the graph where buyers need a credible bridge between immersion platforms and direct-to-chip liquid architectures. It improves coverage of dense AI and HPC thermal pathways without broadening the taxonomy beyond the existing cooling stack.

## Key capabilities
- immersion cooling systems
- direct-to-chip liquid cooling relevance
- thermal platform design for dense AI and HPC environments

## Best fit for
- operators evaluating advanced liquid cooling paths
- colocation and enterprise AI infrastructure teams
- programs where rack density is pushing beyond air-first designs
